parameterdescription.para: The snapshot ID for the branch

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

parameterdescription.para: The snapshot ID for the tag

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining
Reference to this for method chaining
Reference to this for method chaining
Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Replace a branch reference with a new snapshot ID.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Replace a branch reference with another reference's snapshot ID.

parameterdescription.para: The reference name to copy the snapshot ID from

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Fast-forward a branch to another reference's snapshot ID.

detaileddescription.para: This is similar to ReplaceBranch but validates that the target snapshot is an ancestor of the current branch snapshot.

parameterdescription.para: The reference name to copy the snapshot ID from

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Replace a tag reference with a new snapshot ID.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Set the minimum number of snapshots to keep for a branch.

parameterdescription.para: The minimum number of snapshots to keep

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Set the maximum snapshot age in milliseconds for a branch.

parameterdescription.para: The maximum snapshot age in milliseconds

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Set the maximum reference age in milliseconds.

parameterdescription.para: The maximum reference age in milliseconds

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Return the kind of this pending update.
Snapshot reference updates are not retryable.

detaileddescription.para: The update snapshots the ref map at construction time and validates rename or fast-forward operations against that captured state. Replaying after a refresh can clobber or reinterpret concurrent ref changes.

briefdescription.para: Apply the pending changes and return the updated and removed references.

detaileddescription.para: TODO(xxx): Add SetSnapshot operations such as SetCurrentSnapshot, RollBackTime, RollbackTo to this class so that we can support those operations for refs.
